_schema.domain: the live hostname (apex or www, served by Caddy from /srv/careerstory/sites/<domain>/)
_schema.grace_started_at: ISO timestamp, present only when status=grace
_schema.grace_ends_at: ISO timestamp, present only when status=grace
_schema.suspended_at: ISO timestamp, present only when status=suspended
_schema.email_alias: ImprovMX or Workspace alias, e.g. amanda@amanda-logan.com -> amanda@gmail.com
